commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Brother. Hebrew, "Acho "which has the same meaning. (Tirinus)
Septuagint, Syriac, "his brethren. "(Calmet)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: out of the house of Abinadab: 2 Samuel 6:3 adds "who was in Gabaa." That is the hill of Cariathiarim, where the ark had been in the house of Abinadab, from the time of its being restored back by the Philistines.
